styleSpine: stylized low-poly, flat-shaded faceted, soft rounded forms, warm desaturated survival palette. A single free-standing game-ready object, only the object itself, nothing else in the scene, no surrounding building and no extra ground plane.

footprints.single: sized to sit on a single hexagonal ground tile.
footprints.small: a small object, hand-to-knee height, sits well within one ground tile.
footprints.landmark: a landmark structure spanning roughly one to two ground tiles.

assets.title: Workbench
assets.prompt: A rustic survival carpenter's workbench: thick weathered wooden top, a small iron vise, a tool block, four sturdy legs.

assets.title: Chest
assets.prompt: A wooden survival storage chest with iron banding, a hinged domed lid, and a front latch, closed.

assets.title: Campfire (shell)
assets.prompt: An unlit survival campfire: a ring of rounded river stones with a few charred crossed logs stacked in the center, no flames.

assets.title: Door Kit
assets.prompt: A rustic wooden door set in a timber frame: two jamb posts, a lintel, a plank slab door, a small iron knob. Just the door and its frame.

assets.title: Window Frame
assets.prompt: A wooden framed window: timber sill and rails around a single translucent glass pane. Just the window unit.

assets.title: Dock Segment
assets.prompt: A short wooden dock segment on pilings: plank deck, two support stringers, four pilings, a simple rope handrail. Weathered timber, modular.

assets.title: Roof Bundle
assets.prompt: A single low-poly triangular prism wedge made of weathered wooden planks: two equal flat rectangular plank panels leaning together and joined along their top edge to form one long peaked ridge, hollow and open underneath, like a simple plank tent or wedge lying on the ground. Only this one wedge shape by itself, nothing else, no walls, no rooms, no doors, no windows.

assets.title: Bedroll
assets.prompt: A survival bedroll: a rolled-out cloth sleeping mat with a strapped blanket bundle at one end, muted blue fabric.

assets.title: Crop Plot (empty bed)
assets.prompt: An empty raised garden bed: a low wooden plank frame around tilled dark soil, no plants growing.

assets.title: Compost Bin
assets.prompt: An empty wooden compost bin: four corner posts and open-top slatted plank walls, weathered.

assets.title: Rain Cistern
assets.prompt: A wooden rain-catch barrel on a low stone base, an iron hoop rim, an angled catch-gutter and a spout, weathered staves.

assets.title: Root Cellar
assets.prompt: A half-buried root cellar entrance: a low stone rim and an angled wooden hatch door set into a small earthen mound.

assets.title: Cave Anchor
assets.prompt: A stacked-stone cairn marker with two short leaning wooden posts and a rope rail, a small teal glowing crystal on top.

assets.title: Fish Trap
assets.prompt: A woven reed cylindrical fish trap with a funnel mouth and bound hoops, resting on a small wooden skid.

assets.title: Shore Net
assets.prompt: A fishing net strung between two wooden stakes with round cork floats along the top rope, staked to shore.

assets.title: Drying Rack
assets.prompt: An empty wooden A-frame drying rack with splayed legs, a horizontal top rail and cross-braces.

assets.title: Weather Vane
assets.prompt: A weathervane: a wooden post on a stone base topped by a compass-rose disk and a directional arrow needle.

assets.title: Lantern Post
assets.prompt: A wooden lamppost with an iron-caged lantern hanging from a side arm.

assets.title: Waystone
assets.prompt: A carved standing waystone: a weathered upright stone monolith on a round base with a carved rune band.

assets.title: Shrine · First Hearth
assets.prompt: A small ancient stone hearth-shrine: a low walk-under arch with five rounded warm hearthstones in a ring, weathered basalt, warm ember tones.

assets.title: Shrine · Rainward Gate
assets.prompt: A stone shrine of leaning rain-fin slabs angled into the wind around a sheltered pocket, slate-blue weathered stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Salt Mirror
assets.prompt: A tidal shore shrine: pale salt-crusted rib arches forming a low crawl undercut, bleached bone-white wet stone.

assets.title: Shrine · High Lantern
assets.prompt: A tall slender lantern-spire shrine: needle stones reaching up around a glowing skylight notch, warm golden stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Root Vault
assets.prompt: An earthy root-shrine: gnarled knuckle-stones and root arches over a low domed cellar chamber, mossy purple-grey stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Red Cairn
assets.prompt: A red sandstone cairn-shrine: angular scree shards fanning out with a narrow split rock gate, oxide-red stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Snow Dial
assets.prompt: A frost sundial shrine: stepped ice-blue stone terraces like a clock face, snow-dusted pale glacial stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Glass Shoal
assets.prompt: A glass-shoal shrine: thin bright glass teeth rising from pale sand with a low reflective ledge, sand-tan and glassy.

assets.title: Shrine · Storm Seat
assets.prompt: A storm-shrine throne: jagged lightning-prong stones around a scooped watch-seat, wind-worn violet-grey stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Reed Crown
assets.prompt: A marsh reed-crown shrine: a ring of tall thin reed stalks around a wet spring mouth, damp green-grey stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Deep Bell
assets.prompt: A deep-bell cave shrine: heavy resonant boulder-bells over a domed stone throat chamber, teal-tinged stone.

assets.title: Shrine · Last Horizon
assets.prompt: A horizon gateway shrine: tall stone posts and long directional wind-vanes forming a departure gate, golden dusk stone.

assets.title: Node · Hearth Coal
assets.prompt: A small dark coal ember with glowing orange cracks sitting in a low ash ring, a harvestable resource nugget.

assets.title: Node · Rain Reed
assets.prompt: A small cluster of bent marsh reeds with glowing rain droplets, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Salt Shell
assets.prompt: A small scatter of pale salt shells with a bright salt glint, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Lantern Shard
assets.prompt: A small stone lantern post holding a glowing golden prism, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Root Pod
assets.prompt: Small knotted root pods with tendrils and a soft green glow, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Red Nodule
assets.prompt: A small red iron-ore nodule with chipped flakes and a glowing pick seam, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Snow Bloom
assets.prompt: A small pale ice-crystal bloom with radiating petals and a faint blue glow, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Glass Shard
assets.prompt: Small fanned translucent glass panes catching light, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Storm Amber
assets.prompt: A small violet storm-amber crystal ringed by crackling charge ribbons, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Reed Kelp
assets.prompt: A small wet tangle of kelp ribbons with a damp glow, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Bell Crystal
assets.prompt: A small ribbed teal cave crystal with a resonance ring and a soft glow, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Node · Horizon Shard
assets.prompt: A small stone bearing-marker with a bar and two directional arrows and a golden glow, a harvestable resource node.

assets.title: Creature · Moss Puff
assets.prompt: A tiny round mossy critter: chunky, an oversized fuzzy green body with a crown of little moss tufts, stubby feet, big simple eyes, a cute harmless forest grazer, goofy proportions.

assets.title: Creature · Brambleback
assets.prompt: A grumpy low-poly hedgehog-boar critter facing forward, its head and face clearly at the front of the body with two big eyes and a snout looking ahead, a hunched bristly body behind, a ring of spiky quills down its back, two little forward horns, stubby legs, goofy proportions.

assets.title: Creature · Shell Skitter
assets.prompt: A tiny cute hermit-crab critter: a rounded sandy body with a little blue shell, six stubby side legs, two antennae, big simple eyes, goofy proportions.

assets.title: Creature · Reedback Grazer
assets.prompt: A calm low-poly capybara-sheep critter: a plump body, a soft mane of reeds along its back, a little tail, stubby feet, a gentle big-eyed face, goofy proportions.

assets.title: Creature · Cave Belljaw
assets.prompt: A goofy clam-trap cave creature: a dome shell that opens like a mouth, a glowing tongue, little cone teeth, two eyestalks poking up, stubby hinge feet, menacing but cute.

assets.title: Creature · Cave Blinker
assets.prompt: An adorable low-poly cave critter: a chubby body, two huge glowing sleepy eyes, tiny antennae with glowing tips, a little pack of glowing mushrooms on its back, stubby feet.

assets.title: Creature · Scree Snapper
assets.prompt: A rocky ambush critter disguised as a pile of grey scree: a flat stone body, two hinged jaw plates, jagged rock shards on its back, stubby wedge feet, glowing eyes.

assets.title: Creature · Storm Burr
assets.prompt: A round fuzzy burr-ball critter: a dense corona of spiky static quills, two little ears, tiny feet, crackling blue electric tips, goofy storm-tumbling hazard.

assets.title: Creature · Tide Lurker
assets.prompt: A flat lurking sea-cave creature: a wide low body, two eyes on stalks, big side paddle-fins, whiskers, a row of little crest spines, a wet amphibious look, goofy.

assets.title: Cave Mouth · Arch
assets.prompt: A weathered stone cave-entrance arch: two leaning rock piers and a lintel, mossy rugged rock, a natural gateway.

assets.title: Cave Mouth · Dry
assets.prompt: A rocky cave mouth framed by rugged stone lips with a stacked-stone cairn marker beside the opening.

assets.title: Cave Mouth · Sea
assets.prompt: A sea-cave mouth in wet dark rock with a stacked-stone cairn and a horizontal tide-line mark.

assets.title: Tree · Pine
assets.prompt: A simple stylized low-poly pine tree made of smooth solid shapes: one short straight brown trunk, topped by two or three smooth solid green cones stacked to a rounded point. The foliage is smooth and simple like clean geometric cones, NOT spiky. No individual needles, no separate branches, no twigs, no loose spikes, no clutter, no random shapes sticking out. Entirely green, no snow. Clean tidy silhouette, one neat object.

assets.title: Tree · Broadleaf
assets.prompt: A stylized low-poly broadleaf tree: a faceted trunk and a rounded leafy green canopy, a single clean mesh.

assets.title: Tree · Dead Snag
assets.prompt: A stylized low-poly dead tree snag: a bare grey faceted trunk with a few broken branches, no leaves.

assets.title: Tree · Shrub
assets.prompt: A small round leafy bush: two or three overlapping rounded blobs of green foliage clustered low to the ground into one soft mound, with just a hint of woody stems peeking out at the base. Chunky flat-shaded facets, low and wide, sitting upright on the ground.

assets.title: Crater · Emberfall
assets.prompt: A stylized meteor impact crater bowl: a charred dark rocky rim with embedded glowing orange crystal shards, just the ground crater, no light beam.

assets.title: Crater · Glass Rain
assets.prompt: A stylized meteor crater bowl: a blue-grey rocky rim with pale cyan glassy shards, just the ground crater, no light beam.

assets.title: Crater · Starbloom
assets.prompt: A stylized meteor crater bowl: an olive rocky rim with yellow-green crystal shards and a ring of stone petals, just the ground crater, no light beam.

assets.title: Drop · Wood Logs
assets.prompt: A small stack of a few chopped wood logs with visible end-grain rings, a tiny game pickup.

assets.title: Drop · Ore Chunk
assets.prompt: A small faceted grey ore rock chunk with a hint of metallic flecks, a tiny game pickup.
